title: Jorg Sacul
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]]|the [[Jorg|Batuu resident]], or other uses of the term [[Sacul (disambiguation)]]}}

'''Jorg Sacul''' was a [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] who suffered a near fatal crash on a [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]] while on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], changing his life course. Emerging from an Academy as the top [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in his class and a natural leader, he would join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Starfighter Corps]] as a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] pilot.

Leading a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] and becoming a [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], Sacul was a renowned mentor to younger squadron members, as well as a visionary storyteller who entertained his pilots with far-flung tales of distant [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxies]] thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Sacul was also rumored as being [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], and many said if he were [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in a different [[Time/Legends|time]], he could have been a great [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] Jorg Sacul [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]],<ref name="Hasbro" /> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]].<ref name="CSWE Tatooine">{{CSWECite|III|224|Tatooine}}</ref> A reckless dreamer, he owned a [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]], and at one point, he got into a near fatal crash on the T-16 while on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. He would eventually go to an Academy, emerging as the top [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in his class and a natural leader.<ref name="Hasbro" />

Sacul went on to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Starfighter Corps]], flying a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] and attaining the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. Sacul led a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], and mentored younger [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] within his squadron.<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Personality and traits==
Once a reckless dreamer before his T-16 crash changed the course of his life,<ref name="Hasbro" /> Sacul's [[Troop/Legends|troops]] knew him as a fearless fighter renowned for his inner strength and ability to remain calm under fire.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|122|Sacul, Jorg}}</ref> He was also a renowned mentor to younger squadron members. A visionary storyteller, Sacul entertained his pilots with far-flung tales of distant [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxies]] thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Sacul had fair skin, [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Skills and abilities==
Sacul emerged from the Academy as top pilot in his class and a natural leader. He was rumored to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], and many said if Sacul were [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in a different [[Time/Legends|time]], he could have been a great [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Equipment==
Sacul wore an orange [[Rebel flight suit]] and a [[Flight helmet/Legends|flight helmet]] adorned with two black [[Alliance Starbird]]s and a dark gray stabilization bar. The [[Helmet/Legends|helmet's]] visor was tinted in a dark color. He was armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]].<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Three years ago, it was Jorg Sacul (blame me for the name), which was George Lucas in a Rebel pilot's outfit with an appropriate "biography" on the card back.|Stephen J. Sansweet, talking about his idea for Jorg Sacul|<ref name="Scouting">{{InsiderCite|81|Scouting the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
[[File:Jorg_sacul.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The Jorg Sacul action figure, in packaging]]
Jorg Sacul was created in [[2002]] for [[Hasbro]]'s [[Star Wars (Hasbro toy line)|''Star Wars Saga'']] toy line, specifically for that year's [[Celebration II]], as a [[Tuckerization]] and with the likeness of ''[[Star Wars]]'' film director [[George Lucas]].<ref name="Hasbro" /> Initially the idea was for a film director with a camera, before the figure was instead thought to be Lucas in [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]], and ultimately a Rebel pilot was thought up, with how the real Lucas had been a film industry rebel as inspiration.<ref name="Prequels">{{InsiderCite|121|Prequels in Plastic and Other Toy Tales}}</ref> [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] came up with the name, and wrote the first draft of the biography for the figure, which was ultimately rewritten, except for a few words, by [[Lucas Licensing]] President [[Howard Roffman]].<ref name="Scouting" /> Sacul's biography talking about his near fatal T-16 skyhopper crash and being a visionary storyteller with far-flung tales of distant galaxies thousands of years before the Republic are similar to George Lucas's near fatal car crash in his teenage years, and his eventually directing the ''Star Wars'' films.<ref name="Lucas">{{WebCite|url=https://www.biography.com/news/george-lucas-car-crash-star-wars|text=George Lucas: The Car Wreck That Changed His Life and Led Him to 'Star Wars'|date=2019-07-31|work=[https://www.biography.com Biography: Historical & Celebrity Profiles]|archivedate=20190805022954}}</ref>

===Celebration Europe illustration===
[[File:Jorg_Sacul_-_Celebration_Europe_2007.png|thumb|right|200px|Jorg Sacul boarding his X-wing]]
In [[2007]], artist [[Ken Steacy]] published a print at [[Celebration Europe (2007)|Celebration Europe]]. The print was published on a card for ''[[2011 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 6]]''. On the image, Sacul is shown boarding his [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]]<ref name="card">{{Topps|set=2011 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 6|cardname=#660 - Who's Running this Show|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/75148/cid/5316244/2011-Topps-Star-Wars-Galaxy-6-660-Who's-Running-this-Show?}}</ref> on the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY's]] [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="note">{{Topps|set=2011 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 6|cardname=#660 - Who's Running this Show|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/75148/cid/5316244/2011-Topps-Star-Wars-Galaxy-6-660-Who's-Running-this-Show?}} is on the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY's]] [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], as the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] are shown together in the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], while the Alliance's [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] is painted in her [[Huttese slave-girl costume]] on Sacul's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]. As shown in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], this can only be chronologically after the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]] shown earlier in the film. Rebel [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] is also shown on the card with the [[Alliance military uniform/Legends|uniform]] he wore to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], so the [[in-universe]] place and [[Time/Legends|time]] on the image are ''Home One'' before the Battle of Endor. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates ''Return of the Jedi'' to 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].</ref> Another Alliance [[Officer/Legends|officer]] is seen painting their compatriot, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], in the latter's [[Huttese slave-girl costume]] on the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], which also has at least six total [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starfighters and a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]. Sacul also has a purple [[R-series/Legends|R-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] in his [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], and the side of his helmet shows a red Alliance Starbird with other red vertical bars in the middle instead of a black Starbird and a single dark gray stabilization bar.<ref name="card" />
